## 📝 Assumptions & Notes

- Prices are USD retail pay-as-you-go rates from Azure Retail Prices API
- EUR conversion uses approximate 1 USD ≈ 0.92 EUR; actual billing may vary
- Storage costs assume stated capacity with moderate transaction volume
- Compute assumes 730 hours/month (24×30.4) continuous operation
- Free tier limits (e.g. App Insights 5 GB, Functions 1M executions) applied where applicable
- Pricing retrieved on {{DATE}} — verify for changes before procurement

### What's NOT Included

- Egress/bandwidth costs (typically <5% of total for web workloads)
- Azure DevOps / GitHub Actions CI/CD costs
- Domain name and SSL certificate costs (if not using App Service managed)
- Support plan costs
- Entra ID P1/P2 licensing (if required for Conditional Access)
